settings.search_intro: This preview-safe search foundation keeps the approved Mzansi Select rhythm in place while live search results, final pricing, and purchase actions remain deferred.
settings.summary_copy: Showing placeholder preview items only. Purchase actions are unavailable in preview, and live search ranking and fulfilment details remain deferred.
settings.empty_description: The no-results experience is now in place, but live search terms, product results, and browse recovery behaviour remain intentionally deferred.
settings.browse_copy: Browse the same trusted departments already established across the homepage and collection foundations while live search data, ranking, and purchase actions remain out of scope for this slice.
